strategy.name: MTF Trend Following Long/Short
strategy.description: Multi-timeframe trend following. Higher timeframe (4H) sets the bias via EMA(50). Lower timeframe (15m) confirms with structure (HH/HL or LL/LH), volume spike, and candle confirmation. Longs in uptrend, shorts in downtrend. Risk/Reward 1:3.

indicators.ema_50_htf: Higher timeframe trend filter. Price above EMA(50) on 4H = bullish bias. Below = bearish bias.
indicators.ema_50_ltf: Lower timeframe trend confirmation. Price must align with HTF direction.
indicators.pivot_highs: Swing highs detected with lookback of 5 bars. Tracks last two to confirm Higher Highs or Lower Highs.
indicators.pivot_lows: Swing lows detected with lookback of 5 bars. Tracks last two to confirm Higher Lows or Lower Lows.
indicators.volume_sma_20: 20-period SMA of volume. Current candle volume must exceed this by 1.5x to confirm strong participation.
indicators.candle_confirmation: Bullish: close > open AND close > previous high. Bearish: close < open AND close < previous low.

long: HTF (4H) price is above EMA(50) — uptrend confirmed on higher timeframe
LTF (15m) price is above EMA(50) — lower timeframe aligned with trend
Structure: last Higher High > previous Higher High AND last Higher Low > previous Higher Low
Volume: current candle volume > SMA(20) x 1.5 — strong participation
Candle: close > open AND close > previous candle high — bullish confirmation
short: HTF (4H) price is below EMA(50) — downtrend confirmed on higher timeframe
LTF (15m) price is below EMA(50) — lower timeframe aligned with trend
Structure: last Lower Low < previous Lower Low AND last Lower High < previous Lower High
Volume: current candle volume > SMA(20) x 1.5 — strong participation
Candle: close < open AND close < previous candle low — bearish confirmation

long.stop_loss: Placed at low of confirmation candle

short.stop_loss: Placed at high of confirmation candle

risk_rules: Position size: 1% of portfolio per trade
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Do not enter if risk (entry to SL distance) is 0 or negative
Do not enter if SL distance exceeds 2.0 ATR — stop too wide
Cooldown: no re-entry for 6 hours after a stop loss hit
Blackout: no entries at 08h, 13h, 14h UTC — session open false breakouts
No trading on Saturday (day 6) — low volume, erratic moves
Only one position at a time per symbol
Paper trade first — validate on each asset before going live
